name: Aurotek Corporation
summary: Aurotek Corporation, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells automation and robotic components under the Aurotek brand in Japan, rest of Asia, Europe, and the United States. Its products include automation and robotics components, such as motors, reducers, sensors, PLC controllers, couplings, ball screws, linear axis actuators, linear bearing systems, motion controllers, motion control ICs, CNC systems, robot control systems, visual identity systems, automatic guided vehicles, self-lube bearings, precision stages, wicking materials, and environmental equipment. The company also offers FA and equipment comprising PCB depaneling systems, robot systems, optical communication machines, DeMeet 3D CNC coordinate measuring machines, and electric screw drivers; and patterning technology and applications, patterned technology and equipment, automatic optical inspection equipment, and laser processing equipment. In addition, it provides isolation and damping devices, natural ventilation systems, and EcoColor external venetian blinds. The company provides solutions to self-lubricated parts; transmissions; power transmissions; drive systems; controllers and robotics for PCB, SMT, LCD, optical, solar, and semiconductor equipment; architectural applications/designs for window operators; seismic isolation systems; and anti-earthquake devices. Aurotek Corporation was founded in 1980 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.
